reviews.review_msg: Very easy class, Andrey marks completely subjectively and it is impossible to do badly. He doesn't teach and relies on students to "present," or lecture, to the class each week on that weeks material. Tests are on excel and are a time crunch.

He was extremely unclear about his instructions. Take any other finance course except BUS 419 with him - absolute nightmare. Super confusing questions, very little instruction and no care for students. MAKE SURE TO AVOID AT ALL COSTS!!!

Extremely clear with what he expects you to learn and tells you exactly what will be on the exams. The course material isn't too difficult and important concepts are covered multiple times. Goes on rants and likes to discuss finance news in class. Definitely recommend!
